sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20106" key="blefarospa/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βλεφᾰρο-σπάξ</orth>, <sense id="n20106.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">arching the eyebrows</tr_>, Hdn.Gr. 1.43.</sense> </entryFree>
